title: deer-flow.tool.usage v1
description: Per-LLM-call usage event from token_usage_middleware. Captures the cost + latency + token shape of every model invocation deer-flow makes. Optional model_fallback field surfaces when the requested model was unavailable and a different one was substituted. High-volume channel (~100-1000/hour); primary substrate for pattern-ingestion baselines. Source: /deer-flow/middlewares.

thread_id.description: Correlates to deer-flow.agent.thread.v1 event for the dispatching agent

tool_name.description: LLM call identifier (e.g. agent name, node name); null when not attributable to a named tool

input.description: Input tokens consumed by this call

output.description: Output tokens generated by this call

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock latency for the LLM call

cost_usd.description: Computed cost; omitted when pricing table unavailable

model_fallback.description: Present only when the resolved model differs from the requested model
